ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/open-gpu-kernel-modules
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/open-gpu-kernel-modules
Language: c
NVIDIA Linux open GPU kernel module source

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenVPN/openvpn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenVPN/openvpn
Language: c
OpenVPN is an open source VPN daemon

ns0:entry.ns0:title: allinurl/goaccess
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/allinurl/goaccess
Language: c
GoAccess is a real-time web log analyzer and interactive viewer that runs in a terminal in *nix systems or through your browser.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: armel/uv-k1-k5v3-firmware-custom
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/armel/uv-k1-k5v3-firmware-custom
Language: c
This is a fork of F4HWN firmware https://github.com/armel/uv-k5-firmware-custom by @muzkr and @armel

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bol-van/zapret
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bol-van/zapret
Language: c
DPI bypass multi platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bol-van/zapret2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bol-van/zapret2
Language: c
anti-dpi software

ns0:entry.ns0:title: capstone-engine/capstone
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/capstone-engine/capstone
Language: c
Capstone disassembly/disassembler framework for ARM, ARM64 (ARMv8), Alpha, BPF, Ethereum VM, HPPA, LoongArch, M68K, M680X, Mips, MOS65XX, PPC, RISC-V(rv32G/rv64G), SH, Sparc, SystemZ, TMS320C64X, TriCore, Webassembly, XCore and X86.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cilium/tetragon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cilium/tetragon
Language: c
eBPF-based Security Observability and Runtime Enforcement

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dorianborian/sesame-robot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dorianborian/sesame-robot
Language: c
An open and affordable mini quadruped robot based on ESP32.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git/git
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git/git
Language: c
Git Source Code Mirror - This is a publish-only repository but pull requests can be turned into patches to the mailing list via GitGitGadget (https://gitgitgadget.github.io/). Please follow Documentation/SubmittingPatches procedure for any of your improvements.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/security-research
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/security-research
Language: c
This project hosts security advisories and their accompanying proof-of-concepts related to research conducted at Google which impact non-Google owned code.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hathach/tinyusb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hathach/tinyusb
Language: c
An open source cross-platform USB stack for embedded system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: littlefs-project/littlefs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/littlefs-project/littlefs
Language: c
A little fail-safe filesystem designed for microcontrollers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: madler/zlib
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/madler/zlib
Language: c
A massively spiffy yet delicately unobtrusive compression library.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nginx/nginx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nginx/nginx
Language: c
The official NGINX Open Source repository.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openssl/openssl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openssl/openssl
Language: c
General purpose TLS and crypto library

ns0:entry.ns0:title: redis/redis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/redis/redis
Language: c
For developers, who are building real-time data-driven applications, Redis is the preferred, fastest, and most feature-rich cache, data structure server, and document and vector query engine.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sabrogden/Ditto
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sabrogden/Ditto
Language: c
Ditto is an extension to the Windows Clipboard. You copy something to the Clipboard and Ditto takes what you copied and stores it in a database to retrieve at a later time.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sqlcipher/sqlcipher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sqlcipher/sqlcipher
Language: c
SQLCipher is a standalone fork of SQLite that adds 256 bit AES encryption of database files and other security features.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: timescale/pg_textsearch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/timescale/pg_textsearch
Language: c
PostgreSQL extension for BM25 relevance-ranked full-text search. Postgres OSS licensed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: valkey-io/valkey
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/valkey-io/valkey
Language: c
A flexible distributed key-value database that is optimized for caching and other realtime workloads.
